TestCase z48Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_data2 = (double*)malloc(t1.n2 * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_data2, t1.data2, t1.n2 * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.data2 = follow_case_data2;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive check: ensure there is at least one element to shift
    if (follow_case.n2 <= 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Right circular shift of data2 (move last element to the front)
    double last_elem = follow_case.data2[follow_case.n2 - 1];
    for (int i = follow_case.n2 - 1; i > 0; --i) {
        follow_case.data2[i] = follow_case.data2[i - 1];
    }
    follow_case.data2[0] = last_elem;
    
    return follow_case;
}
